special_mechanics.name: BT Big Hammer
special_mechanics.description: Pimple's special move at the end of a combo wherein an exaggerated hammer protrudes from his fists, instantly killing foes

special_mechanics.name: Big Boot Block
special_mechanics.description: Rash's classic special move where his foot transforms into a massive, spiky boot

special_mechanics.name: Speeder Bikes Racing
special_mechanics.description: Stage 3 gameplay featuring racing on speedbikes with obstacle dodging mechanics

special_mechanics.name: Snake Riding
special_mechanics.description: Stage 4 gameplay where player rides along massive, fast-moving snakes to reach exit

special_mechanics.name: Boss Jump Attack
special_mechanics.description: Rocky (stone pig boss) jumps high in air and stomps ground

tier_notes: Tier 2 empirical/qualitative data. No precise movement physics parameters documented in available sources. Game features character-specific combat mechanics and varied level types but specific physics values are not provided in Wikipedia or TCRF disambiguation pages consulted.
